text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 48 

OIP_COV_DAYS 

LABEL: Other Inpatient Hospital Covered Days 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of covered days in the non-acute inpatient hospital setting for the year. This 
variable equals the sum of the CLM_UTLZTN_DAY_CNT variables on the source claims. 

These “other” inpatient (OIP) claims are a subset of the claims in the IP data file consisting of data from 
IP
